business.name: Cajun Flare
business.location: 7841 Reseda Blvd, Reseda, Los Angeles, CA

copy.headline: Louisiana Bold. California Soul.
copy.subtitle: Authentic Cajun cuisine from a Black woman-owned kitchen in LA

weekly_seafood_boils.description: Every Sunday — shrimp, squid, blue crab, scallops, seasonal crawfish, plus vegetarian options

monthly_plate_lunches.description: Rotating monthly menu — made fresh in small batches

desserts.description: Louisiana sweetness to finish things off

large_orders.description: Custom and large orders available with 96 hours advance notice

story.bio: My name is Chelsea, and I'm the owner and chef behind Cajun Flare. I'm originally from Crowley, Louisiana — the Rice Capital of America — and I started Cajun Flare to share the bold, soulful flavors of my hometown with my community here in L.A.
story.differentiator: Even the rice I use is sourced directly from the Crowley Rice Mill in my hometown — bringing an authentic piece of Louisiana to every plate.
story.mission: My goal is to share real Louisiana flavor with people who crave food that's made from the heart — flavorful, filling, and unforgettable.
